sources.transform_notes: Projected remediation-relevant fields (friction, cost, actor class, harm severity, situation routing) from defense-copy-v3-keyed.json destinations; UI copy, renderer config, and AI guardrails intentionally excluded. See scripts/normalize-intelligence.mjs.

review.notes: Normalized import artifact. Not wired to runtime; joins into remediation.json require review.

records.whyMatters: AdGuard DNS can block ads and trackers at the DNS layer across browsers and apps.
Advanced Background Checks is prioritized by public opt-out references as a people-search or broker exposure to check and remove when present.

records.displayName: Delete or reset Android advertising ID
records.whyMatters: Deleting or resetting the Android advertising ID reduces app-level advertising linkage.
Android Privacy Dashboard shows recent app access to camera, microphone, location, and other sensitive permissions.
Apple ID security controls protect device recovery, passkeys, and account access.
An AT&T transfer PIN helps block unauthorized number transfers.
A password manager reduces credential reuse, which makes breached data less useful for account takeover.
Brave ships with built-in tracker, ad, fingerprinting, and cookie protections.
AT&T fraud support can review unauthorized SIM or number-transfer activity.
Carrier fraud teams can lock down port-out risk after a SIM hijack.
Verizon fraud support can review unauthorized SIM or number-transfer activity.
ChexSystems freezes can reduce fraudulent bank-account opening in your name.
Clustal is prioritized by public opt-out references as a people-search or broker exposure to check and remove when present.

records.whyMatters: A claimed Medicare account helps prevent medical identity misuse through an unclaimed portal.
DeleteMe performs ongoing removals across many broker and people-search sites.
DPPA-related DMV privacy choices can reduce exposure of motor-vehicle record data.
DuckDuckGo App Tracking Protection can block many third-party tracker calls from Android apps.
DuckDuckGo browser and extensions block trackers and can reduce app or web tracking depending on platform.
Early Warning Services supports bank-account risk checks, so it matters for unauthorized deposit accounts.
EasyOptOuts offers lower-cost automated removals across many data broker sites.
Use Equifax disputes to challenge inaccurate Equifax report entries.
Freezing Equifax helps prevent new credit from being opened in your name.
Use Experian disputes to challenge inaccurate Experian report entries.
Experian is one of the core credit files lenders check before issuing credit.
Facebook profile data can expose recovery clues, social graph, or impersonation material.
Firefox Enhanced Tracking Protection blocks many social, cross-site, fingerprinting, and crypto-mining trackers.
The FTC report creates a recovery record you can use with bureaus and institutions.
The FTC recovery plan gives you a structured next-action list when the incident is unclear.
Ghostery can block advertising and analytics trackers across supported browsers and mobile browsing surfaces.
Google account security controls protect email, password recovery, and OAuth app access.
Known breach exposure tells you which credentials deserve immediate rotation.
Email aliases reduce cross-site account linking and make broker enrichment harder.
Incogni sends recurring removal requests to supported data brokers.
Use Innovis disputes to challenge inaccurate Innovis consumer report entries.
Innovis is a fourth national consumer reporting file that some creditors check.
Instagram profile data can expose recovery clues, social graph, or impersonation material.
Disabling Apple personalized ads limits Apple ad personalization from App Store, News, and Stocks activity.
Turning off app tracking requests reduces cross-app advertising identifier tracking on iPhone.

records.displayName: Audit iOS location and sensitive permissions
records.whyMatters: Reviewing iOS permissions reduces unnecessary access to location, contacts, photos, camera, microphone, and Bluetooth.
iOS permission review reduces app access to location, contacts, photos, and sensors.
Safari cross-site tracking controls reduce web trackers that follow you across sites.
Form 14039 creates an IRS identity-theft affidavit when a return was rejected or fraud is suspected.
An IRS IP PIN helps prevent someone else from filing a tax return as you.
LexisNexis Risk Solutions reports can be used in identity, insurance, and account-opening decisions.
LinkedIn profile data can expose recovery clues, social graph, or impersonation material.
Claiming and securing Login.gov reduces risk across connected government services.
Men Stopping Violence is prioritized by public opt-out references as a people-search or broker exposure to check and remove when present.
